|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[Akihabara massacre]] * [[2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}} [[Category:Chiyoda, Tokyo|µ]] [[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]] [[Category:Tokyo ward templates|Chiyoda]] </noinclude>

|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[Akihabara massacre]] * [[2015 Tokyo drone incident]]

|1_group2 = [[Kōjimachi, Tokyo|Kōjimachi]] Area |1_list2 = * [[Chiyoda, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] * [[Fujimi, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Fujimi]] * [[Gobanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Gobanchō]] * [[Hayabusachō]] * [[Hibiya Park|Hibiyakoen]] * [[Hirakawachō]] * [[Ichibanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Ichibanchō]] * [[Iidabashi]] * [[Kasumigaseki]] * [[Kioichō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Kioichō]] * [[Kitanomaru Park|Kitanomarukoen]] * [[Kōjimachi]] * [[Kokyo Gaien National Garden|Kokyogaien]] * [[Kudankita]] * [[Kudanminami]] * [[Marunouchi]] * [[Nagatachō]] * [[Nibanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Nibanchō]] * [[Ōtemachi]] * [[Rokubanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Rokubanchō]] * [[Sanbanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Sanbanchō]] * [[Uchisaiwaichō]] * [[Yonbanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Yonbanchō]] * [[Yūrakuchō]] * [[Hitotsubashi, Chiyoda|Hitotsubashi]] (1-chōme)
|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[Casals Hall]] * [[Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[:en:Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[:en:Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[:en:Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[:en:Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[Marunouchi Building]] * [[National Archives of Japan]] * [[National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[National Theatre of Japan]] * [[Nippon Budokan]] * [[Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]

|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]

|1_group1 = [[:en:Kanda, Tokyo|Kanda]] Area |1_list1 = * [[:en:Aioichō, Tokyo|Aioichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Awajichō, Tokyo|Awajichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Hanaokachō, Tokyo|Hanaokachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Higashi-Kanda|Higashi-Kanda]] * [[:en:Higashikonyachō, Tokyo|Higashikonyachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Higashimatsushitachō, Tokyo|Higashimatsushitachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Iwamotochō|Iwamotochō]] * [[:en:Izumichō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Izumichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Jinbōchō, Tokyo|Jinbōchō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Kajichō, Tokyo|Kajichō]] * [[:en:Kanda-Hirakawachō|Hirakawachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Iwamotochō|Iwamotochō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Kajichō, Tokyo|Kajichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Kanda-Misakichō|Misakichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Kanda-Sarugakuchō|Sarugakuchō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Kitanorimonochō, Tokyo|Kitanorimonochō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Konyachō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Konyachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Matsunagachō, Tokyo|Matsunagachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Mikurachō, Tokyo|Mikurachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Mitoshirochō, Tokyo|Mitoshirochō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Neribeichō, Tokyo|Neribeichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Nishifukudachō, Tokyo|Nishifukudachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Nishi-Kanda|Nishi-Kanda]] * [[:en:Nishikichō|Nishikichō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Ogawamachi, Tokyo|Ogawamachi]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Sakumachō, Tokyo|Sakumachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Sakumagashi, Tokyo|Sakumagashi]]<sup>K</sup> * [[:en:Akihabara|Soto-Kanda]] * [[Sudachō, Tokyo|Sudachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Surugadai]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Tachō, Tokyo|Tachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Tomiyamachō, Tokyo|Tomiyamachō]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Tsukasamachi, Tokyo|Tsukasamachi]]<sup>K</sup> * [[Uchi-Kanda]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi, Chiyoda|Hitotsubashi]] (2-chōme)
|1_group2 = [[:en:Kōjimachi, Tokyo|Kōjimachi]] Area |1_list2 = * [[:en:Chiyoda, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] * [[:en:Fujimi, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Fujimi]] * [[:en:Gobanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Gobanchō]] * [[:en:Hayabusachō|Hayabusachō]] * [[:en:Hibiya Park|Hibiyakoen]] * [[:en:Hirakawachō|Hirakawachō]] * [[:en:Ichibanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Ichibanchō]] * [[:en:Iidabashi|Iidabashi]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki|Kasumigaseki]] * [[:en:Kioichō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Kioichō]] * [[:en:Kitanomaru Park|Kitanomarukoen]] * [[:en:Kōjimachi|Kōjimachi]] * [[:en:Kokyo Gaien National Garden|Kokyogaien]] * [[:en:Kudankita|Kudankita]] * [[:en:Kudanminami|Kudanminami]] * [[:en:Marunouchi|Marunouchi]] * [[:en:Nagatachō|Nagatachō]] * [[:en:Nibanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Nibanchō]] * [[:en:Ōtemachi|Ōtemachi]] * [[Rokubanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Rokubanchō]] * [[Sanbanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Sanbanchō]] * [[Uchisaiwaichō]] * [[Yonbanchō, Chiyoda, Tokyo|Yonbanchō]] * [[Yūrakuchō]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi, Chiyoda|Hitotsubashi]] (1-chōme)
|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[:en:Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[:en:Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[:en:Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[:en:Marunouchi Building|Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]] * [[:en:National Diet Building|National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[:en:National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[:en:National Theatre of Japan|National Theatre of Japan]] * [[:en:Nippon Budokan|Nippon Budokan]] * [[:en:Old Ministry of Justice Building|Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[Wadakura Bridge]] * [[Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[:en:Nishogakusha University|Nishogakusha University]] * [[Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[:en:Kyūjō incident|Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[:en:Marunouchi Building|Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]] * [[:en:National Diet Building|National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[:en:National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[:en:National Theatre of Japan|National Theatre of Japan]] * [[:en:Nippon Budokan|Nippon Budokan]] * [[:en:Old Ministry of Justice Building|Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[:en:Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[:en:Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[:en:Sanno Park Tower|Sanno Park Tower]] * [[Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[:en:Wadakura Bridge|Wadakura Bridge]] * [[:en:Yasukuni Shrine|Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[:en:Nishogakusha University|Nishogakusha University]] * [[:en:Senshu University|Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[:en:Otsuma Women's University|Otsuma Women's University]] * [[Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1860)|Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1932)|Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[:en:Kyūjō incident|Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}

|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[:en:Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[:en:Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[:en:Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[:en:Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[:en:Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[:en:Marunouchi Building|Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]] * [[:en:National Diet Building|National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[:en:National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[:en:National Theatre of Japan|National Theatre of Japan]] * [[:en:Nippon Budokan|Nippon Budokan]] * [[:en:Old Ministry of Justice Building|Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[:en:Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[:en:Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[:en:Sanno Park Tower|Sanno Park Tower]] * [[:en:Shin-Marunouchi Building|Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:Supreme Court of Japan|Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo International Forum]] * [[Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[:en:Wadakura Bridge|Wadakura Bridge]] * [[:en:Yasukuni Shrine|Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[:en:Nishogakusha University|Nishogakusha University]] * [[:en:Senshu University|Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[:en:Otsuma Women's University|Otsuma Women's University]] * [[:en:Tokyo Chinese School|Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1860)|Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1932)|Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[:en:Kyūjō incident|Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>

|group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Akihabara Station|Akihabara]]/[[:en:Iwamotocho Station|Iwamotochō]] (JR, Metro, Toei, Tsukuba Express, bus terminal) * [[:en:Ichigaya Station|Ichigaya]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Iidabashi Station|Iidabashi]] (JR, Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Jimbōchō Station|Jimbōchō]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Kanda Station (Tokyo)|Kanda]] (JR, Metro) * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Station (Tokyo)|Kasumigaseki]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kokkai-gijidō-mae Station|Kokkai-gijidō-mae]]/[[:en:Tameike-Sannō Station|Tameike-Sannō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Kudanshita Station|Kudanshita]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Nagatachō Station|Nagatachō]] (Metro) * [[:en:Ōtemachi Station (Tokyo)|Ōtemachi]] (Metro, Toei) * [[:en:Tokyo Station|Tōkyō]] (JR, Shinkansen, Metro, bus terminal) * [[:en:Yūrakuchō Station|Yūrakuchō]]/[[:en:Hibiya Station|Hibiya]] (JR, Metro, Toei)
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = <!--This template should list each and every building that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for landmarks in Chiyoda may be made--> * [[:en:Casals Hall|Casals Hall]] * [[:en:Comic Takaoka|Comic Takaoka]] (closed) * [[:en:Hotel New Otani Tokyo|Hotel New Otani Tokyo]] * [[:en:Holy Resurrection Cathedral|Holy Resurrection Cathedral]] * [[:en:Jimbōchō Book Town|Jimbōchō Book Town]] * [[Kanda Shrine]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Common Gate|Kasumigaseki Common Gate]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki Building|Kasumigaseki Building]] * [[:en:Marunouchi Building|Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]] * [[:en:National Diet Building|National Diet Building]] * [[:en:National Diet Library|National Diet Library]] * [[:en:National Museum of Modern Art, Tokyo|National Museum of Modern Art]] * [[:en:National Theatre of Japan|National Theatre of Japan]] * [[:en:Nippon Budokan|Nippon Budokan]] * [[:en:Old Ministry of Justice Building|Old Ministry of Justice Building]] * [[:en:Prime Minister's Official Residence (Japan)|Prime Minister's Official Residence]] * [[:en:Prudential Tower (Tokyo)|Prudential Tower]] * [[:en:Sanno Park Tower|Sanno Park Tower]] * [[:en:Shin-Marunouchi Building|Shin-Marunouchi Building]] * [[:en:Supreme Court of Japan|Supreme Court of Japan]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Tokyo International Forum|Tokyo International Forum]] * [[:en:Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho|Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho]] * [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department|Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department]] Headquarters * [[:en:Wadakura Bridge|Wadakura Bridge]] * [[:en:Yasukuni Shrine|Yasukuni Shrine]]
|group4 = Education<!--This template should list each and every education that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made. Non-notable kindergartens, elementary, and junior high schools that *do not* have their own articles ate not to be listed. --> |list4 = * [[:en:Graduate School of Management, Globis University|Graduate School of Management, Globis University]] * [[:en:Hitotsubashi University|Hitotsubashi University]] <small>Kanda Campus</small> * [[:en:Hosei University|Hosei University]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]] * [[Nihon University ]] * <small>Kudan campus of the</small> [[:en:Nishogakusha University|Nishogakusha University]] * [[:en:Senshu University|Senshu University]] * [[Sophia University]] * [[:en:Gyosei Junior and Senior High School|Gyosei Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Hibiya High School|Hibiya High School]] * [[:en:Otsuma Women's University|Otsuma Women's University]] * [[:en:Tokyo Chinese School|Tokyo Chinese School]] * [[:en:Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University|Tokyo Kasei-Gakuin University]]
|group5 = History<!--This template should list each and every historical event that qualifies for a Wikipedia article until/unless there are too many. Then a new template for history of Chiyoda may be made--> |list5= * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1860)|Sakuradamon incident (1860)]] * [[:en:Hibiya incendiary incident|Hibiya incendiary incident]] * [[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] * [[Toranomon incident]] * [[:en:Sakuradamon incident (1932)|Sakuradamon incident (1932)]] * [[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[:en:Kyūjō incident|Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing|1974 Mitsubishi Heavy Industries bombing]] * [[:en:Akihabara massacre|Akihabara massacre]] * [[:en:2015 Tokyo drone incident|2015 Tokyo drone incident]]
}}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>
